name_en: .!!️【New】Gucci Jackie Small Shoulder Bag. Crafted from premium leather, this new Gucci Jackie Small shoulder bag showcases the brand's classic craftsmanship, crescent shape, and stylish design. Light gold-tone hardware, leather trim, and a matching strap with red and green webbing combine to offer more styling possibilities for this Gucci Jackie Small bag made of the brand's classic red Gucci Rosso Ancora leather. Gucci Rosso Ancora leather, light gold-tone hardware, leather lining, inside: one zip pocket, Gucci logo zip pull, handle (18cm high), detachable webbed shoulder strap (52cm high), hook closure, weight: approx. 0.4kg.
name_cn:
.!!️【New】Gucci Jackie Small Shoulder Bag. Crafted from premium leather, this new Gucci Jackie Small shoulder bag showcases the brand's classic craftsmanship, crescent shape, and stylish design. Light gold-tone hardware, leather trim, and a matching strap with red and green webbing combine to offer more styling possibilities for this Gucci Jackie Small bag made of the brand's classic red Gucci Rosso Ancora leather. Gucci Rosso Ancora leather, light gold-tone hardware, leather lining, inside: one zip pocket, Gucci logo zip pull, handle (18cm high), detachable webbed shoulder strap (52cm high), hook closure, weight: approx. 0.4kg.
Model: 782849.
Dimensions: 27.5(W) x 19(H) x 4(D)cm
Color: Red/Original Leather.
Made in Italy
Model height 177cm
Max capacity: iPhone Pro Max/Plus, AirPods, long wallet, and lipstick
